about: Add a new tool, alias, or capability to the setup

## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what to add and why -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed change
<!-- Describe the implementation approach. Include code snippets if helpful. -->

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] 
- [ ] Install is idempotent (running setup twice does not error)
- [ ] Works on all target platforms (check which apply: Windows / Linux / macOS)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
